basic_details.job_title: DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Counselor, Assistant-cum-DEO and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Godda (DCPU Godda)
basic_details.post_name: District Child Protection Officer, Counselor, Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Godda (DCPU Godda) Recruitment 2026: District Child Protection Unit Godda has released the official notification for 3 District Child Protection Officer, Counselor, Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: DCPS-01: 35-45 years, DCPS-05: 30-45 years, JJB-01: 21-35 years
age_limit.details: District Child Protection Officer (DCPS-01): 35-45 years Counselor (DCPS-05): 30-45 years Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator (JJB-01): 21-35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in social work/sociology/child development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management, Graduate in social work/sociology/Psychology/Public Health/Counselling OR PG/Diploma in Counselling and Communication, 12th pass with Diploma/Certificate in Computer
qualification.details: District Child Protection Officer (DCPS-01): Post Graduate degree in social work/sociology/child development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University. Counselor (DCPS-05): Graduate in social work/sociology/Psychology/Public Health/Counselling from a recognized University OR PG/Diploma in Counselling and Communication. Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator (JJB-01): 12th pass from a recognized Board/Equivalent Board with Diploma/Certificate in Computer.

salary_details.details: District Child Protection Officer (DCPS-01): 44,023/- Counselor (DCPS-05): 18,536/- Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator (JJB-01): 11,916/-

selection_process: Merit List based on Educational Qualification Score Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Godda Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: godda.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Godda Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Godda Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026 is 20-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of District Child Protection Officer, Counselor, and Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator in the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the District Child Protection Officer post?
faq.answer: For the District Child Protection Officer post, a Post Graduate degree in social work/sociology/child development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Counselor (DCPS-05) post is between 30 to 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026 includes the creation of a Merit List based on Educational Qualification Score, followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant-cum-Data Entry Operator (JJB-01) post is 11,916/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Godda, which is godda.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the positions under the DCPU Godda Recruitment 2026 is contractual.
